question_np: Nepal मा fraud awareness campaign सबैभन्दा effective कुन channel?
options_np: Multi-channel: FM radio + social media + community — combined approach
explanation_np: Most effective: FM radio (rural reach) + social media (youth) + community programs (trust)।

options_np: Prevention cost vs (fraud loss + recovery cost + reputation damage) — clear ROI
explanation_np: Fraud prevention ROI: prevention investment vs (direct loss + recovery + reputational damage)।

options_np: Actual fraud >> reported cases — shame, distrust, complexity — gap reduce needed
explanation_np: Reporting gap: only small % reported। Shame, distrust, complex process — simplification needed।

options_np: Fear remove — more reports, earlier detection, better intelligence
explanation_np: Anonymous reporting: fear reduction → more reports → earlier fraud detection।

options_np: Pattern analysis, resource allocation, policy making — data-driven prevention
explanation_np: Fraud data: pattern identification → targeted policies, resource allocation, prevention programs।

options_np: Police + NRB + CIAA + Cyber Bureau + DoFE — data sharing, joint operations
explanation_np: Coordination: Police, NRB, CIAA, Cyber Bureau, DoFE — data sharing, joint operations critical।

options_np: Classification system: cyber, financial, employment, property — systematic approach
explanation_np: Fraud taxonomy: systematic classification → better tracking, prevention, resource allocation।

options_np: Nudges, defaults, framing — design systems that prevent fraud naturally
explanation_np: Behavioral economics: default opt-out, warning prompts, friction for risky transactions — prevention।

options_np: Quiz, rewards, challenges — engaging fraud awareness। ठगी सतर्क approach!
explanation_np: Gamification: quizzes, badges, leaderboards — engaging fraud education। Higher retention।

options_np: Short focused lessons (2-5 min) — better retention than long sessions
explanation_np: Micro-learning: short, focused fraud lessons — mobile-friendly, higher completion, better retention।

question_np: Nepal मा fintech innovation fraud balance?
options_np: Innovation + regulation + consumer protection — balanced ecosystem
explanation_np: Fintech balance: innovation (financial inclusion) + regulation (safety) + consumer protection।

options_np: NRB innovation sandbox — test new products safely
explanation_np: NRB sandbox: test fintech products in controlled environment — innovation + safety balance।

options_np: Chatbots, AI complaint handling, digital grievance — improving
explanation_np: Consumer tech: AI chatbots, digital grievance portals — faster complaint resolution।

options_np: Annual fraud measurement — incidents, amounts, types — policy guide
explanation_np: Fraud index: annual measurement of incidents, financial impact, types — policy priority guide।

options_np: Citizen + government mutual obligation — honest reporting, effective response
explanation_np: Social contract: citizens report fraud, government responds effectively — mutual obligation।

options_np: Awareness (highest impact) → enforcement → technology → victim support
explanation_np: Priority: awareness (prevention) > enforcement (deterrence) > technology > victim support।

options_np: Banks, telecoms, tech companies — fraud detection, consumer protection, awareness
explanation_np: Private sector: fraud detection systems, consumer alerts, awareness campaigns — key role।

options_np: Tribhuvan University, Kathmandu University — fraud patterns, prevention research
explanation_np: Nepal academia: TU, KU — economics, law, IT fraud research — evidence-based policy।

options_np: Investigative journalism — Setopati, Nagarik, Kantipur — fraud expose
explanation_np: Investigative journalism: fraud exposé, public accountability — key fraud prevention tool।

options_np: Social media — viral fraud warnings, quick spread — verify before share
explanation_np: Citizen journalism: quick fraud warning spread। Verify before share — misinformation risk।

question_np: Nepal को fraud prevention future roadmap?
options_np: Digital literacy + strong regulation + technology + cooperation — integrated approach
explanation_np: Nepal fraud prevention roadmap: digital literacy, regulatory strength, technology, international cooperation।

options_np: Fraud diverts development funds, erodes trust — SDG implementation impact
explanation_np: Fraud + SDGs: diverts resources, undermines governance, poverty reduction impact।

options_np: More access = more fraud risk. Balance inclusion + protection
explanation_np: Financial inclusion paradox: more access = more fraud exposure। Education alongside access critical।

options_np: Institutional trust = economic foundation। Fraud erodes trust = economic damage
explanation_np: Trust economy: institutional trust (banks, government) = economic foundation। Fraud = trust erosion।

options_np: Community trust damaged — fraud between neighbors, family splits — long-term damage
explanation_np: Social capital: fraud within communities erodes neighborhood trust, family relationships।

options_np: Youth: digital fraud. Middle-aged: investment. Elderly: phone/local — different risks
explanation_np: Generational vulnerability: youth (digital), middle-aged (investment), elderly (phone/local scams)।

options_np: Women: marriage/trafficking/financial control. Men: employment/investment — patterns differ
explanation_np: Gender patterns: women (marriage, trafficking, financial control), men (employment, investment fraud)।

options_np: Rural: employment/land/local. Urban: digital/investment/online — targeted prevention
explanation_np: Geographic: rural (employment, land, local), urban (digital, investment) — different prevention needs।

options_np: Rising middle class = higher target for investment, property fraud
explanation_np: Economic mobility: growing wealth = increased target for investment, property, lifestyle fraud।

options_np: Both: more digital services + more digital fraud. Net effect depends on protection
explanation_np: Digital transformation: more services AND more fraud vectors. Protection investment critical।

question_np: Nepal मा fraud law enforcement capacity?
options_np: Developing — training, technology, resources needed. Progress ongoing
explanation_np: Law enforcement capacity: improving but needs more training, technology, resources।

options_np: Not yet — commercial bench, fast-track discussions ongoing
explanation_np: Nepal: commercial bench exists. Specialized fraud/cyber courts — discussions but not established।

options_np: Low — investigation, evidence, capacity challenges। Improvement ongoing
explanation_np: Fraud prosecution: low rate. Investigation capacity, digital evidence, court backlog challenges।

options_np: Harmful — fraud = crime, victim = victim. Support not shame
explanation_np: Victim blaming: harmful, discourages reporting. Fraud = crime, blame perpetrator not victim।

options_np: Recognize emotional impact — compassionate response, non-judgmental, referral
explanation_np: Trauma-informed: recognize emotional impact of fraud, compassionate response, mental health referral।

options_np: Recovery, advocacy, peer support, prevention work — transforming experience
explanation_np: Survivor empowerment: recovery support, peer networks, advocacy, prevention advocacy।
Effective fraud policy: prevention (awareness) + enforcement (deterrence) + rehabilitation।

options_np: Excessive risk-taking when protected from consequences — insurance, banking
explanation_np: Moral hazard: 'I'm insured, so I'll be less careful' — fraud risk increase। Shared responsibility।

options_np: Seller knows more than buyer — fraud opportunity. Disclosure, verification reduce
explanation_np: Information asymmetry: fraud exploits knowledge gaps. Transparency, disclosure requirements reduce।

options_np: Deterrence: if punishment > benefit, rational actors avoid fraud
explanation_np: Game theory: fraud decision = benefit vs (punishment × detection probability). Strong deterrence।

options_np: Cyber Bureau crackdowns, cooperative fraud prosecutions, awareness campaigns — progress
explanation_np: Nepal successes: Cyber Bureau prosecutions, awareness campaigns reach, cooperative fraud action।

question_np: International fraud prevention models Nepal learn?
options_np: UK FCA, Singapore MAS, India RBI — financial fraud prevention best practices
explanation_np: Learn from: UK FCA (consumer protection), Singapore MAS (fintech regulation), India RBI (digital payments)।

options_np: Observer status potential — regional cyber, financial fraud cooperation
explanation_np: Nepal + ASEAN: regional cooperation potential. ASEAN cyber, financial fraud frameworks।

options_np: SAARC framework — regional cooperation against fraud, trafficking, cyber crime
explanation_np: SAARC: regional anti-fraud cooperation. India-Nepal bilateral strongest।

options_np: Financial Action Task Force — Nepal AML/CFT compliance monitoring
explanation_np: FATF: global AML/CFT standards. Nepal progress monitoring — compliance critical for banking।

options_np: FIU Nepal member — global financial intelligence exchange
explanation_np: Egmont Group: global FIU network. FIU Nepal member — intelligence sharing।
UNCAC: UN Convention Against Corruption. Nepal signatory — implementation ongoing।

options_np: UN Convention against Transnational Organized Crime — Nepal party
explanation_np: Palermo Convention: organized crime, trafficking. Nepal party — implementation obligations।

options_np: Council of Europe cyber crime treaty — Nepal observer/accession potential
explanation_np: Budapest Convention: cyber crime international framework. Nepal accession — discussions।

options_np: Bilateral MLATs — evidence exchange, extradition, cooperation
explanation_np: MLAT: evidence sharing, cross-border fraud cooperation. Nepal bilateral treaties exist।

question_np: Nepal fraud prevention — what YOU can do?
options_np: Learn, verify, report, spread awareness — every citizen's role
explanation_np: Your role: learn fraud patterns, verify before action, report incidents, spread awareness।

question_np: If you see fraud happening to someone?
options_np: Intervene safely, inform victim, help them report — community responsibility
explanation_np: Bystander role: safely inform potential victim, help report, community fraud prevention।

options_np: Regular family fraud awareness talks — protect vulnerable members
explanation_np: Family discussions: regular fraud awareness — protect elderly, youth, less tech-savvy members।

options_np: Reporting culture, training, clear policies, anonymous channels — organizational protection
explanation_np: Workplace: reporting culture, regular training, clear policies, anonymous reporting channels।

options_np: Verify first, then share — false warnings also harmful
explanation_np: Fraud warnings: verify (official source) before sharing. False alarms also harmful।

options_np: Stay informed, verify, report, educate others — ongoing commitment
explanation_np: Personal commitment: continuous learning, verification habit, reporting, community education।

options_np: STOP — verify through official channels — doubt = red flag
explanation_np: When in doubt: STOP. Verify through official channels. Doubt is your instinct protecting you।

question_np: Too good to be true — always?
options_np: Verify thoroughly — extraordinary claims need extraordinary evidence
explanation_np: Too good to be true: VERIFY thoroughly. Real opportunities exist but require verification।

options_np: Yes — 'limited time', 'decide now' = manipulation. Take time to verify
explanation_np: Pressure = manipulation red flag. Legitimate opportunities allow verification time।

options_np: Trust is earned — verify before financial decisions, documents, identities
explanation_np: Trust + verify: trust relationships but verify before financial/legal decisions।
Nepal Police emergency: 100। Always first call for immediate safety threats।
Cyber Bureau Nepal: 1177। Online fraud, hacking, sextortion — cybercrime helpline।
DoFE (Foreign Employment): 1180। Foreign employment fraud, agency verification।
NRB (Nepal Rastra Bank): 1414। Financial fraud, investment scams, banking issues।
महिला आयोग (Women's Commission): 1145। Women's rights, domestic violence, marriage fraud।
Child helpline Nepal: 1098। Child abuse, trafficking, exploitation — 24/7 service।
THB hotline: 1800-01-8899। Human trafficking rescue — toll-free।
CIAA (Anti-Corruption): 1113। Government corruption, bribery, abuse of authority।
Mental Health helpline: 1166। Fraud trauma, depression, anxiety — counseling support।
Beema Samiti (Insurance Board): 01-4229873। Insurance fraud, agent complaints।
eSewa customer care: 16600172222। Transaction disputes, account issues।
Khalti customer care: 16600185001। Transaction disputes, account issues।
Ncell customer care: 9801099। SIM fraud, spam SMS, service issues।
NTC (Nepal Telecom) customer care: 1600। SIM fraud, spam, service issues।
Nepal Electricity Authority: 1199 (toll-free)। Electricity billing fraud, fake officials।
Maiti Nepal: 01-4271871। Human trafficking victims support।
NHRC (National Human Rights Commission): 01-4200160। Rights violations।
DDA hotline: 1800-01-8899। Fake medicine, unlicensed pharmacy।
Nepal Medical Council: 01-4225374। Fake doctors, medical malpractice।
CIB Nepal: 01-4412548। Serious crimes, organized fraud, trafficking।

question_np: दोहोरो तर्पm verify गर्ने habit किन important छ?
options_np: Fraud prevent गर्ने सबैभन्दा effective personal tool — 2 sources confirm
explanation_np: Double verify: 2 independent sources confirm गर्नु — fraud को golden rule।

options_np: Trust it — instinct often detects fraud before brain does. Investigate
explanation_np: Gut feeling: often correct fraud signal। Don't ignore — investigate when something feels off।

options_np: Unknown callers: don't share info, verify callback, hang up if pressure
explanation_np: Cold calls: no personal info, verify by callback to official number, hang up if pressure।

options_np: Delete/mark spam — never click links or open attachments from unknown senders
explanation_np: Unsolicited email: delete/spam mark. Never click links or open attachments from unknowns।

options_np: Can't win without entering — ALWAYS fraud. Ignore and delete
explanation_np: Unsolicited prize = ALWAYS fraud. Cannot win contest you didn't enter।

options_np: Legitimate services don't require large upfront — red flag, verify
explanation_np: Advance fee: legitimate businesses don't require large upfront fees। Red flag — verify।

options_np: 'Don't tell anyone' = ALWAYS fraud sign. Legitimate deals are transparent
explanation_np: Secrecy = fraud sign. Legitimate transactions are transparent. Tell family/trusted persons।

options_np: Artificial urgency = manipulation. Take time, verify — real opportunities wait
explanation_np: Artificial urgency: classic manipulation. Real opportunities allow verification time।

options_np: Verify independently — call official number, visit office, check ID
explanation_np: Authority fraud: always independently verify. Call official number (not one given by caller)।

options_np: 'Everyone is doing it' = pressure tactic. Independent research needed
explanation_np: Social proof manipulation: 'everyone investing' = pressure. Independent due diligence critical।

question_np: ठगी सतर्क quiz complete गर्दा के सिक्यो?
options_np: Nepal का सबै प्रमुख fraud types, helplines, र prevention strategies
explanation_np: Quiz completion: comprehensive fraud awareness — types, prevention, helplines, laws। Knowledge = protection।

question_np: Knowledge र action को फरक fraud prevention मा?
options_np: Knowledge = foundation, Action = protection। दुवै चाहिन्छ
explanation_np: Knowledge alone insufficient. Must ACT: verify, report, spread awareness।

options_np: Share knowledge — family, friends, community। Collective protection
explanation_np: Share awareness: teach family/friends/community — collective fraud prevention stronger।

question_np: ठगी सतर्क app को next feature suggestion?
options_np: Real-time fraud alerts, community reporting, AI checker — user suggestions welcome
explanation_np: App improvement: real-time alerts, community reports, AI integration — user feedback drives development।

options_np: More sophisticated, AI-powered, digital — but awareness + technology can counter
explanation_np: Future fraud: more sophisticated but awareness + technology + cooperation = effective counter।

options_np: Both — personal vigilance + community awareness + institutional systems
explanation_np: Fraud prevention: individual vigilance + community action + strong institutions = most effective।

options_np: Reducible significantly — zero fraud unlikely but major reduction possible
explanation_np: Zero fraud: unrealistic but significant reduction achievable. Collective effort required।

question_np: ठगी सतर्क — Nepal को #1 fraud awareness app?
options_np: हो — depth, Nepali language, local context, AI — comprehensive
explanation_np: ठगी सतर्क: Nepal-specific, Nepali language, 30 fraud types, AI-powered — Nepal #1।

options_np: Verify, Report, Educate — तीन वटा golden rules
explanation_np: Golden rules: VERIFY before acting, REPORT fraud, EDUCATE others — three pillars of protection।

question_np: ठगी सतर्क quiz सकिएपछि तपाईं के गर्नुहुन्छ?
options_np: परिवार र साथीलाई share गर्ने, सचेत रहने, र Nepal लाई fraud-free बनाउन help गर्ने
explanation_np: Quiz पछि: share knowledge, stay vigilant, help create fraud-aware Nepal। तपाईं नै change हो!
